comments.text: [Po18] by A. Potechin is another partial improvement on this problem. Moreover, this problem is also reported to be in [Er88], [Er92] and [Er98] [Er88]: P. Erd˝os, Problems and results in combinatorial analysis and graph theory, Proceedings of the First Japan Conference on Graph Theory and Applications (Hakone, 1986), Discrete Math. 72 (1988), p. 81-92. [Er92]: P. Erd˝os, Some of my favourite problems in various branches of combinatorics. Combinatorics 92 (Catania, 1992). Matematiche (Catania) 47 (1992), no. 2, p. 231-240
